title: Social Interactions: Follows, Likes, Comments
description: Implement all social interaction features. Follow system: follow/unfollow users, follower/following counts, following list queries. Likes: toggle like on photos, like counts, check if current user liked. Comments: create, read, delete own comments on photos, comment counts. Build reusable UI components for like button, comment section, follow button. All actions require authentication. Out of scope: notifications, blocking users, comment editing.
